description: 3DEC Python SDK documentation index for quick lookup and LLM-assisted API discovery

block.description: Functions and classes for working with 3DEC blocks.

block.face.description: Functions and classes for working with 3DEC gridpoints.

block.gridpoint.description: Functions and classes for working with 3DEC gridpoints.

block.subcontact.description: Functions and classes for working with block subcontact.

block.zone.description: Functions and classes for working with zones.

itasca.description: Core simulation control and command execution
